mapper.select: SELECT bbv.seq, bbv.name, bbv.ispurchased, bbv.noneedtobuy, bbv."type", volume , book, id, cover, bbv.isbn FROM devext.bookbyvolume bbv WHERE name like CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY book, volume

SELECT bbv.seq, bbv.name, bbv.ispurchased, bbv.noneedtobuy, bbv."type", bbv.volume , bbv.book, bbv.id, bbv.cover, bbv.isbn FROM devext.bookbyvolume bbv join devext.branchbook b on b.book = bbv.book WHERE b.volume = bbv.volume and b.branchname like CONCAT('%', #{branch}, '%') ORDER BY bbv.name, bbv.book, bbv.volume
